name: Senior engineering pod
scenario: A repository issue asks for deterministic retry behavior around a flaky API client.
workflow_steps: Convert the issue into a minimal file-level implementation plan.
Write or update the focused failing test.
Review the diff for correctness, security, reuse, and overengineering.
Run validation gates and summarize residual risk.
policy_gates: No implementation starts before a concrete plan exists.
No merge recommendation is allowed before tests and review.

input_contract.description: Concrete scenario input for this pattern example.
